titlestmt.titleproper: Cornell University Vice President for Public Affairs records4-3-1451
titlestmt.author: Compiled by RMC Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-05-31 18:25:09 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Cornell University Vice President for Public Affairs records

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Vice President for Public Affairs

did.abstract: Includes records of state and national college and university associations; American Council on Education and other education organizations; Cornell programs, events, departments, and divisions; Cornell Center for International Studies; Cornell committees, commissions, councils, etc.; budgets; R.O.T.C.; students, including campus unrest, 1970; possible Cornell-C.I.A. connections; annual reports; Public Affairs Cabinet notes; Public Affairs Workshop materials; and related records of the Cornell Vice President for Public Affairs; includes files of Steven Muller. Also, a phonodisc of a training program panel, 1960.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Includes records of state and national college and university associations; American Council on Education and other education organizations; Cornell programs, events, departments, and divisions; Cornell Center for International Studies; Cornell committees, commissions, councils, etc.; budgets; R.O.T.C.; students, including campus unrest, 1970; possible Cornell-C.I.A. connections; annual reports; Public Affairs Cabinet notes; Public Affairs Workshop materials; and related records of the Cornell Vice President for Public Affairs; includes files of Steven Muller. Also, a phonodisc of a training program panel, 1960.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Cornell University Vice President for Public Affairs. Records, #4-3-1451. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

accessrestrict.head: Access Restrictions:
accessrestrict.p: Access restricted to the permission of the office of origin.

controlaccess.subject: College Students -- Political activity -- New York (State) -- Ithaca.
Education -- Societies, etc.
